fsymId.description: Factset Regional Security Identifier. Six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with an -R suffix (XXXXXX-R). Identifies the security's best regional security data series per currency. For equities, all primary listings per region and currency are allocated a regional-level permanent identifier. The regional-level permanent identifier will be available once a SEDOL representing the region/currency has been allocated and the identifiers are on FactSet.

eventId.description: FactSet identifier that uniquely identifies the Event.

divTypeCode.description: Dividend Type Code. For code descriptions, visit [Online Assistant Page #8764] (https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/8764).

announcementDate.description: Date Event was announced in YYYY-MM-DD format.

recordDate.description: Date of Record for distribution in YYYY-MM-DD format.

payDate.description: Date of Payment for distribution in YYYY-MM-DD format.

effectiveDate.description: Effective Date or Ex-Date of distribution in YYYY-MM-DD format.

currency.description: Currency ISO code. For more details, visit [Online Assistant Page #1470](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/1470).

amtDefNetGrossIndicator.description: Net/Gross Marker Code. For details describing Net vs. Gross dividends, visit [Online Assistant Page #11512](https://oa.apps.factset.com/pages/11512).

amtDefTradingAdj.description: Default Amount - Trading Currency, Split Adjusted

amtGrossTradingAdj.description: Gross Amount - Trading Currency, Split Adjusted

amtNetTradingAdj.description: Net Amount - Trading Currency, Split Adjusted

amtDefDecAdj.description: Default Amount - Declared Currency, Split Adjusted

amtGrossDecAdj.description: Gross Amount - Declared Currency, Split Adjusted

amtNetDecAdj.description: Net Amount - Declared Currency, Split Adjusted

frankDefTradingAdj.description: Default Frank - Trading Currency, Split Adjusted

frankDefDecAdj.description: Default Frank - Declared Currency, Split Adjusted

taxRate.description: Tax Rate for on gross dividend for net dividend.

requestId.description: Identifier that was used for the request.
